title: Crazy Swords
description: The craziest swords you could ever think of!
body:
To craft each sword from this mod, you need the Sword essence, which falls only from the Swordsman

At the moment, there are 60 swords (and a mop) in the mod

Each sword has its own unique feature

For example, the Cake Sword increases the attacker's hunger indicator when attacking with a small chance

The Creeper Sword creates Creepers and has a chance to explode (an achievement is awarded for this)

The mop throws opponents to a long distance


![Big swords can be obtained by creating their structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a36d5ad3461d371a2dd7488ba11a7884bcb6efa2.png)
